info.name: Documents & Templates API
info.description: Complete API collection for Document Management and Template System

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Login with username/email and password. Token will be automatically saved to collection variables.
Request OTP for phone login
Request OTP for email login
Verify OTP and login. Use phone_number OR email with otp_code. Token will be automatically saved.
Logout current user

item.description: Authentication endpoints - Login first to get your auth token

item.name: User Documents

request.description: Get all documents for the current user
Get details of a specific document

formdata.description: aadhar, pan, passport, driving_license, bar_certificate, degree, fir, petition, evidence, order, agreement, affidavit, notice, contract, invoice, receipt, correspondence, medical_report, police_report, witness_statement, power_of_attorney, vakalatnama, other

request.description: Upload a new document
Update document details
Verify or reject a document (Admin only)
Soft delete a document (Admin only)
Restore a soft-deleted document (Admin only)
Get documents uploaded by current user
Get all documents for a specific client
Get all documents for a specific case

query.description: Document type: aadhar, pan, passport, petition, evidence, etc.

request.description: Get documents filtered by document type
Get all soft-deleted documents (Admin only)
Get documents for a specific user (for profile pages)

item.description: APIs for managing user documents with upload, verification, and soft-delete

request.description: Upload a pre-filled form document
Share filled template with client
Client signs the filled template
Advocate signs the filled template
Get templates for current user (advocate sees created, client sees shared)

Get form history/audit trail

Get specific checklist item details
Auto-create checklist items from template for a case
Get all checklist items for a specific case with statistics
Update checklist item (mark as received, verified, rejected)
Advocate verifies the document
Advocate rejects the document with reason
Get all pending documents across all cases

item.name: Legal Notices

query.description: Filter by status: draft, ready_to_send, sent, delivered, read, response_received, no_response, deadline_expired, bounced
Filter by type: legal_notice, demand_notice, termination_notice, eviction_notice, cease_desist, other

request.description: Get all legal notices
Get specific legal notice details

body.raw:
{
    "case": "{{case_id}}",
    "notice_type": "legal_notice",
    "subject": "Legal Notice for Property Dispute",
    "recipient_name": "Mr. Rajesh Sharma",
    "recipient_address": "123 Main Street, Delhi - 110001",
    "recipient_email": "rajesh@example.com",
    "recipient_phone": "+91-9876543210",
    "notice_content": "This is to inform you that you have encroached on my property...",
    "response_deadline": "2024-06-15"
}

request.description: Create a new legal notice
Update legal notice
Delete a legal notice
Get all legal notices for a specific case
Get all notices awaiting response
Get all notices with overdue responses
Advocate manually updates notice status with notes
Mark notice as sent via email
Mark email as delivered
Mark email as opened/read by recipient
Mark notice as sent via WhatsApp
Mark WhatsApp message as delivered
Mark WhatsApp message as read by recipient
Mark notice as sent via physical delivery (post/courier)
Mark physical delivery as completed with proof upload
Get complete delivery status for all methods (email, WhatsApp, physical)

item.description: APIs for managing legal notices with multi-channel delivery tracking (Email, WhatsApp, Physical)

item.name: Document Requests (Advocate → Client)

query.description: Filter by status: pending, uploaded, verified, rejected
Filter by priority: high, medium, low

request.description:
Get all document requests based on user role.

**Advocate**: Requests for their assigned cases
**Client**: Requests for their cases
**Admin**: All requests in their firm
Get details of a specific document request including status, uploaded document, and notes.

body.raw:
{
    "case": "{{case_id}}",
    "document_type": "pan",
    "document_title": "PAN Card",
    "description": "Need your PAN card for tax verification. Please upload a clear photo or scan.",
    "priority": "high",
    "due_date": "2024-05-20",
    "advocate_notes": "Required for filing. Must be valid and not expired."
}

request.description:
Advocate creates a document request for client.

**Required Fields:**
- case: Case UUID
- document_type: Type of document
- document_title: Title/name of document

**Optional Fields:**
- description: What document is needed and why
- priority: high, medium, low (default: medium)
- due_date: Deadline for submission
- advocate_notes: Internal notes
Advocate updates document request details like description, priority, or due date.
Advocate deletes a document request. Only the advocate who created it can delete.
Get all document requests for a specific case. Useful for case detail page.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, uploaded, verified, rejected
Filter by priority: high, medium, low

request.description:
Client gets all document requests for their cases with summary statistics.

**Response includes:**
- List of requests
- Summary: total, pending, uploaded, verified counts

Client fulfills a document request by providing the uploaded document ID.

**Workflow:**
1. Client first uploads document using POST /api/documents/
2. Client then calls this endpoint with the document_id
3. Status changes from 'pending' to 'uploaded'
4. Advocate gets notified to verify

**Required:**
- document_id: UUID of the uploaded document

**Optional:**
- client_notes: Any notes from client

Advocate verifies the uploaded document.

**Action:** "verify"

Status changes from 'uploaded' to 'verified'.
Document verification_status also updated to 'verified'.

Advocate rejects the uploaded document with reason.

**Action:** "reject"
**Required:** rejection_reason

Status changes from 'uploaded' to 'rejected'.
Client can see the rejection reason and re-upload.

Get count of pending requests for showing badges/notifications.

**For Client:**
Returns count of pending requests (documents they need to upload)

**For Advocate:**
Returns count of uploaded documents waiting for verification

**Response:**
```json
{
  "pending_count": 3
}
```

item.description: APIs for advocates to request documents from clients with tracking and verification
